title: mimosa dolens subsp. callosa
intro: Mimosa dolens subsp. callosa, also known as sensitive plant, is a plant species native to South America that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mimosa dolens subsp. callosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
